message.content:
@startuml
participant "Actor" as Actor

participant ":Chantier" as :Chantier

participant "jmb:Artisan" as jmb:Artisan

participant "q:Qualif" as q:Qualif

participant "real : Realiser" as real : Realiser

Actor -> :Chantier : getPayeArtisan(jmb)

:Chantier -> jmb:Artisan : q : getQualif()

:Chantier -> q:Qualif : tauxH getTauxH()

loop [ForEach real]
    :Chantier -> real : a = getArtisan()
    opt [a == jmb]
        :Chantier -> real : d = getDuree()
        :Chantier -> :Chantier : duree += d
    end
    :Chantier -> Actor : duree*tauxH
end

@enduml
